induction_input: The book the student the tutor the professor recommended hired read lost.
The software the developer the client the manager selected hired used failed.
The letter the secretary the clerk the intern drafted copied mailed vanished.
The song the singer the producer the director hired advised recorded debuted.
The car the driver the mechanic fixed sold crashed.
induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence featuring quadruple-embedded relative clauses with four nouns followed by four verbs (e.g., "The [Noun1] the [Noun2] the [Noun3] the [Noun4] [Verb4] [Verb3] [Verb2] [Verb1]"). Avoid triple embedding (three nouns and three verbs) or any fewer levels of nesting.
